overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through the ancient Egyptian village of Heraklion at night. The character navigates between mud-brick buildings, passes through a market area with bonfires, and approaches the waterfront while encountering NPCs and animals.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the large mud-brick building with an arched entrance

notable_agents.action: two villagers standing near the arched gateway entrance

entered.detail: tall rectangular structure with weathered beige walls and blue painted trim near the base
large rounded arch entrance with stone steps leading up to a wooden door
burning fire in a metal brazier casting warm orange light on the building facade
rough wooden planks and poles attached to the side of the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path in an ancient Egyptian village at night, approaching a large mud-brick building with an arched stone entrance. A fire brazier burns near the entrance where two NPC villagers stand, and wooden scaffolding is attached to the building's side.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with bonfire and animal pen

events.description: character turns left around the corner of the mud-brick building

agents.ego_description: turning left around the building corner and proceeding toward the open village square

notable_agents.action: white horse standing still near a wooden fence and hay bales

entered.detail: pale horse with saddle standing near wooden fencing
large burning bonfire with tall flames illuminating the open area
wooden market stall with straw roof and fabric awning

segments.scene_description: The character turns left around the building into a more open village square. A white horse stands near wooden fencing on the left, while a large central bonfire burns in the middle of the dirt clearing. A thatched-roof market stall is visible as the character moves deeper into the square.

scene_state.functional_zone: market area with vendor stalls and villagers

events.description: black dog runs across the path from right to left in front of the character

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area passing groups of villagers and vendor stalls

notable_agents.action: black dog running across the dirt path from right to left

entered.detail: wooden stall with draped fabric canopy and hanging goods
white stone structure with smoke rising from the top
cluster of NPCs in robes walking and conversing in the street

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a moderately crowded market area with canvas-canopied stalls on the right and a smoking stone kiln on the left. Groups of villagers walk through the dirt street, and a black dog suddenly runs across the path from right to left.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock area with view of river

events.description: approaching the waterfront with view of river, boats, and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking toward the waterfront dock area with a glowing fast travel beacon visible ahead

entered.detail: wooden pier structures extending into the water with mooring posts
tall vertical beam of blue-white light indicating a fast travel point
wooden boats with sails docked along the river shore
dark mountain range visible against the night sky across the water

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the village market onto a waterfront dock area. A glowing blue fast travel beacon stands prominently on the path ahead, while wooden piers extend into the river where sailboats are moored. Mountains are visible in the distance across the water under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nocturnal Egyptian village that transitions from narrow mud-brick corridors into an open waterfront. It begins along a dirt path approaching a large building with an arched stone entrance and burning braziers, before turning left to enter a wide village square illuminated by a central bonfire. As the camera moves deeper into the settlement, the scene shifts into a bustling market area filled with canvas-canopied stalls and a smoking stone kiln, where a black dog suddenly darts across the path. The movement finally carries the character out of the market and onto the waterfront docks, passing a glowing blue beacon toward wooden piers and moored sailboats with distant mountains silhouetted against the night sky.
